theme.vibe: Personal, warm, honest, editorial, intimate. Feels like writing in a journal or reading a letter from a trusted friend, intentionally rejecting the cold/scripted feel of typical AI chat interfaces.

hierarchy.h1_empty_state: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#2C2C28] font-serif
hierarchy.h2_sidebar: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#7A7A71] mb-4

layout_and_spacing.structure: Three-column desktop layout (Sidebar, Main Chat, Memory Panel). On mobile, Sidebar and Memory Panel are drawers/sheets.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-[#E3E0D8] bg-[#F1EFE9] h-screen flex flex-col p-6
layout_and_spacing.main_chat: flex-1 flex flex-col h-screen bg-[#F9F8F6] relative
layout_and_spacing.memory_panel: w-72 border-l border-[#E3E0D8] bg-[#EEF1EC] h-screen flex flex-col p-6 overflow-y-auto
layout_and_spacing.chat_container: max-w-3xl mx-auto w-full px-4 md:px-8 py-8 flex-1 overflow-y-auto flex flex-col gap-8
layout_and_spacing.input_area: max-w-3xl mx-auto w-full px-4 md:px-8 pb-8 pt-4

user_message.bubble: bg-[#EBE8E0] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-4 max-w-[80%] text-[#2C2C28] font-sans text-base shadow-sm

ai_message.bubble: bg-transparent py-2 max-w-[85%] text-[#2C2C28] font-serif text-lg leading-relaxed
ai_message.avatar: w-8 h-8 rounded-full overflow-hidden mr-4 shrink-0 shadow-sm border border-[#E3E0D8]

input_box.container: relative flex items-end w-full bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E3E0D8] shadow-sm focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-[#D05C42]/20 focus-within:border-[#D05C42] transition-all p-2 pl-6
input_box.textarea: flex-1 max-h-32 min-h-[44px] bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-0 resize-none py-3 font-sans text-base placeholder:text-[#7A7A71]
input_box.send_button: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#D05C42] text-white flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-[#BA4C33] transition-colors shrink-0 m-1

memory_card.container: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm border border-[#E3E0D8] rounded-xl p-4 mb-3 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow group relative

sidebar_item.container: w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#E3E0D8] transition-colors text-sm text-[#2C2C28] font-sans truncate mb-1

motion_and_interactions.message_streaming: Words should fade in smoothly (opacity transition) rather than pop in jarringly.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background color changes for list items. Copy buttons should fade in on group hover (opacity-0 to opacity-100).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-out' for layout shifts and focus states.

ai_avatar_texture.usage: Use this abstract terracotta/sage watercolor texture as the background for the AI's circular avatar.

empty_state_bg.usage: Use as a very subtle, faded background image (opacity-20, mix-blend-multiply) behind the empty state welcome message, or as a small rounded-2xl accent image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the provided google_fonts_url into the index.html head.
Implement the 3-column layout using flexbox/grid. Hide sidebar and memory panel behind Sheet components on mobile.
Use Newsreader font specifically for the AI's rendered Markdown responses to give it an editorial, 'letter' feel.
Do NOT use typical gray/blue AI chat colors. Stick strictly to the warm earthy palette.
Ensure all interactive elements have the specified data-testid attributes.
For the AI Avatar, use the 'ai_avatar_texture' image URL as an object-cover background.
Markdown rendering should support code blocks, but keep the prose typography elegant (serif for AI).
